hanged.def: 處以絞刑的(過去式/分)的人的人 (或物) (絞)
hanged.ex: He was hanged for his crimes.

hanging/put/death.def: 懸掛、裝飾的人物、絞刑人物、懸掛的、絞刑地的人的人 (或物) (掛/絞)
hanging/put/death.col: hanging basket, hanging jury (嚴厲陪審團)
hanging/put/death.ex: A hanging basket of flowers on door.

hangman/killer.def: 絞刑執行者、劊子手人物 (單數) (員)

hang-over/sickness.def: 宿醉、(喻)殘餘物、遺留物人物 (單數) (醉/殘)
hang-over/sickness.ex: I have a terrible hang-over today.

hang-up/stop/problem.def: (口)障礙、挫折的人物、(心)心理障礙人物 (單數) (障)

hank/rope/part.def: (繩/紗)束、卷、(海)帆環人物 (單數) (束/環)
hank/rope/part.ex: Buying a hank of blue wool.

hanker/want/long.def: 渴望、追求的人的人 (渴/求)

hankering/wanting/long-.def: 渴望、追求的人物、渴望地的人的人 (或物) (渴)
hankering/wanting/long-.ex: He has a constant hankering for it.

hannah/old.def: (舊/俚)老太婆、(專)女子名人物 (單數) (婆)
hannah/old.ex: Hannah was a kind lady, indeed.

hans.def: (專)漢斯(德語男子名)、(喻)德國人人物 (單數) (漢)
hans.ex: Hans is a very common name, sir.

hansom/cab.ex: Riding in an old Victorian hansom.

hap/luck.def: (古)偶然、運氣、(喻)幸運物人物、偶然發生的人的人 (偶/運)
hap/luck.ex: It was just a lucky hap, sir.

hap-.def: 運、幸的人的人人物 (單數) (運)

haphazard/random.def: 偶然地、無計畫地、任意地、偶爾的、受天命地的人的人物 (單數) (任/偶)
haphazard/random.ex: The_books were piled in haphazard way.

haphazardly/randomly.def: 偶然地、雜亂無章地、隨意地
haphazardly/randomly.ex: Items were scattered so in the_room.

hapless/bad/luck.def: 不幸的、運氣不好地的人的人物 (單數) (憐)

happen/occur.def: 發生、偶然遇見的人的人 (發/遇)
happen/occur.col: happen to be, as it happens

happening/occurrence.def: 事件、偶然發生的、正在發生地的人的人 (或物) (件)
happening/occurrence.ex: It was a very strange happening.

happi-ly/good.ex: They lived together so for years.

happi-ness/good.def: 幸福、快樂、慶幸人物 (單數) (幸/樂)

happy/good/lucky.def: 快樂的、幸福的、(喻)恰當的、幸運地的人的人物 (單數) (樂/幸/恰)
happy/good/lucky.col: happy birthday, happy ending, happy hour
happy/good/lucky.ex: I'm so happy to see you again.

happy-go-lucky/free.def: 無憂無慮的、隨遇而安地的人的人物 (單數) (逸)

harangue/talk/angry.def: (激昂/漫長)演說的人物、斥責物人物、熱烈演說的人的人人物、熱烈地說的人的人 (演/斥)

harangued/talked.def: 受斥責的、被慷慨演說地的人的人 (或物) (斥)

harass/hurt/bother.def: 騷擾、糾纏、(軍)煩擾的人的人 (騷/擾)
